dimensions.requirements_gathering: Evaluates user story decomposition, business scope discovery, and process engineering mapping.
dimensions.stakeholder_communication: Evaluates clarity of delivery, conflict resolution framing, and translation of technical requirements to business values.
dimensions.analytical_thinking: Evaluates metric tracking design, KPI optimization analysis, and data-driven prioritization approaches.
dimensions.sql: Evaluates complex aggregations, window operations, performance indexing, and multi-table joining techniques.
dimensions.excel: Evaluates advanced model forecasting, macro processing, array lookups, and pivot data summaries.
dimensions.power_bi: Evaluates semantic model design, DAX calculated metric formulas, and interactive canvas layout usability.
